items.briefing:
A new report warns that Australian executives are treating AI as purely an IT issue, while security experts note AI adoption is outpacing proper cloud security controls — creating real risk for organisations rushing to implement AI tools without adequate safeguards. Separately, Microsoft has released an emergency patch for SharePoint, so IT teams should prioritise applying this update promptly. Malware has also been found embedded in thousands of GitHub repositories, so staff should avoid downloading unfamiliar code or software from unverified sources.

There is also a reminder to stay alert to spyware being secretly installed on personal or work phones — often by someone with brief physical access to the device. **Practical tip:** Lock your phone with a strong PIN and regularly check your installed apps for anything unfamiliar or unexpected.

featured.title: Australian executives treat AI as IT function, report
featured.quote: Half of Australian firms use AI without proper governance due to poor executive communication.
